ops.text: ccx (cc-context CLI) crash-looped this morning: 8+ .ips crash reports in ~/Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports between 05:24 and 07:11 on 2026-07-14 (ccx-2026-07-14-052425.ips through ccx-2026-07-14-071107.ips), spanning at least two plugin versions (0.10.0/0.12.0/0.14.0 binaries were all resident as MCP servers). Noticed while sweeping crash reports during the Arc cookie-wipe forensics — unrelated to that incident, but something (likely one of the concurrent sessions' heavy ccx usage) is hitting a repeatable crash. The .ips files carry full stacks; triage from ccx-2026-07-14-071107.ips before the reports rotate.
